title: cracca microphylla
intro: Cracca microphylla, also known as the dwarf broom or little broom, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family that is native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Cracca microphylla include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to protect against certain infections. Cracca microphylla can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its effects.
